hypotheses.name: SV3 STRING confidence gradient
hypotheses.method: Split 3092 STRING pairs (score>=0.4) into 5 quintiles by score. For each quintile, compute mean SV3 co-pole z-score (K=52, N_null=300) across 12 layers. Compute Spearman rho of quintile midpoint vs mean z.
hypotheses.next_action: Run SV4 quintile gradient (SV4_IDX=3) to check if monotonic confidence encoding extends to a 4th axis. Also add per-layer breakdown for SV3.

hypotheses.name: SV2/SV3/SV4 axis independence test
hypotheses.method: For each axis (SV2,SV3,SV4), extract top-K=52 and bottom-K=52 gene poles per layer. Compute pairwise Jaccard overlap of pole gene sets (layer-averaged). For each STRING pair, compute per-axis mean co-pole indicator over 12 layers. Report inter-axis Pearson correlation of per-pair copole rates.
hypotheses.primary_metric: inter-axis Pearson correlation of per-pair copole rates
hypotheses.next_action: Use axis-dominant pair assignments (SV2=1547, SV3=850, SV4=695) to test whether GO/TRRUST category composition differs across axis-dominant pair subsets — would mechanistically explain orthogonality.

hypotheses.name: SV4 GO biology profile
hypotheses.method: For SV4 (index 3) at layers 7, 8, 11: extract top-K=52 and bottom-K=52 genes. Run Fisher's exact test for 591 GO terms (size 3-50 named genes). Report top enriched GO terms per layer per pole.
hypotheses.primary_metric: top GO enrichment p-value per layer
hypotheses.result_value: Layer 7 bottom: GO:0005768 endosome p=8.2e-4 (APP,FLT1,KDR); Layer 8 top: GO:0009615 virus response p=2.7e-3 (CCL5,IFNG,FOXP3); Layer 11 top: GO:0045202 synapse p=3.5e-3 (APP,CLU,EGR3)
hypotheses.next_action: Compare SV4 GO profile systematically against SV2 and SV3 profiles to quantify biological distinctiveness across axes. SV4 endosome/apoptosis vs SV2 immune effector vs SV3 immune/signaling.
